signupData.goalsElaboration: Build some muscle and lose weight. Feel less stressed.
signupData.locationElaboration: Apartment - dumbbells, resistance bands, pull-up bar

onboardingMessages: I want to build some muscle and lose weight. Also just feel less stressed.
I work out at home in my apartment - I have dumbbells, resistance bands, and a pull-up bar
I can do maybe 30 minutes max, 4 days a week but it varies
